Listing.title: Cozy Beach Cottage in Goa
Listing.description: Unwind at this stunning beachside cottage. Enjoy a morning espresso on the sun-drenched deck before walking down to the pristine sand of Morjim beach.

Listing.title: Mountain View Cabin in Manali
Listing.description: Charming cabin nestled high in the pine ridges of Manali. Perfect for winter snow-watching or quiet summer retreats with spectacular Himalayan views.

Listing.title: Royal Haveli Suite in Jaipur
Listing.description: Experience royal Rajasthani hospitality. Beautifully preserved 19th-century haveli suite featuring hand-painted frescoes and a peaceful courtyard pool.

Listing.title: Private Sunset Villa in Bali
Listing.description: Luxury clifftop villa overlooking the Indian Ocean. Features an infinity pool, private chef service, and unparalleled views of the tropical sunset.

Listing.title: Modern Designer Loft in Tokyo
Listing.description: A sleek, minimalist loft in the heart of Shibuya. Flooded with natural light, high-end amenities, and just steps away from legendary city restaurants.

Listing.title: Rustic Safari Tent in Serengeti
Listing.description: Immersive wilderness glamping in the Serengeti. Comfortable queen-sized bed, en-suite solar shower, and unforgettable wildlife viewings from your porch.

Listing.title: Elysian Treehouse in Kerala
Listing.description: Suspended in the rainforest canopy, this wooden treehouse offers a unique jungle stay in Wayanad with misty mountain breezes and birdsongs.

Listing.title: Luxury Beachfront Resort in Maldives
Listing.description: Our signature overwater villa lets you slide straight into crystal clear waters. Pristine white sands and complete premium isolation at its absolute finest.
